_comment: Synthetic replay of the actual INITIAL_PURCHASE event RC fired to us at 2026-05-31T22:24:47Z after admin@silexdev.com paid via live Stripe checkout. Field values pulled from the Supabase function log line + the RC customer record. After the auth-UUID fallback fix, this should resolve to admin@silexdev.com's profile via auth.admin.getUserById, update subscription_status to 'trial', subscription_plan to 'pro', trial_end_date to 2026-06-07, and cache revenuecat_app_user_id.
